div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
① 候选生成
FactorComboExpert 38模板
35% 宽范围随机探索
35% 结构化反馈调参
30% Exploitation 邻域搜索
去重 seen_hash / template cap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
② 组合回测
PortfolioBacktester
ProcessPoolExecutor 并行
多股因子打分→选Top-N→持仓
OOS=252天（从末尾截出）

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
③ 评估评分
Evaluator v2.0
硬过滤: 年化≥-2% 夏普≥0.05
交易≥1次 回撤≤25%
PBO门控: ≥0.50→REJECT ≥0.30→×0.85
五维评分: Sortino×0.22 + Calmar×0.18
+ IR×0.18 + DD×0.18
+ Alpha缩放×0.24
Alpha缩放=max(0, min(100, α×5))
多样性奖励(0~8分) + 交易质量(-2~+3)
决策: ACCEPT≥45 CONDITIONAL≥25

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
④ 冠军保留
Top-3 上轮非REJECT策略注入
按 strategy_id 去重

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑤ LLM 策略评审
DebateManager 两阶段
阶段1: 逐策略独立 LLM 评审
阶段2: 阵营权重裁决
trend_weight / mr_weight

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑥ 风险评估
RiskExpert
VaR 99% 计算
评级: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/VERY_HIGH

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑦ 组合优化
_build_portfolio
相关性矩阵 ρ>0.75 → 降权重
风险加权分配
Top-N=4 最终入选

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑧ OOS 验证
Holdout=30天（样本外）
Walk-Forward
检查: OOS收益>0 且衰减bias>-80%

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑨ 元监控
MetaMonitor
收敛判断: 5轮冠军分未提升→收敛
LLM 元专家判断假收敛

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
⑩ 元专家规划
rnd < 20 且未收敛?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
动态调整:
combo_candidates / accept_threshold
conditional_threshold
n_stocks_min/max / rebalance_options
进入下一轮 rnd+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
收敛 / 满20轮
输出最终报告
